subject: feat(cors): add sun-sea-o and glow-props origins, document frontend consumers
body:
Replace stale devmade-ai.github.io origin with sun-sea-o.vercel.app and
glow-props.vercel.app. Add Frontend Consumers table to CLAUDE.md linking
each consumer repo and its CLAUDE.md for cross-repo context.
